# Tactic by Signal Layer Table

| Layer | Tactic families | Research question |
|---|---|---|
| Visibility | clipping, astroturfing, trend simulation, engagement pods, content farms | Is reach being earned by independent audience interest or engineered by coordinated distribution? |
| Credibility | fake reviews, hidden sponsorship, edited testimonials, trust badges, synthetic personas | Does the audience have enough context to judge trustworthiness? |
| Conversion | fake leads, invalid clicks, fake installs, trial padding, webinar inflation | Does the metric correspond to genuine buying/user intent? |
| Attribution | click flooding, install hijacking, cookie stuffing, coupon intercepts | Did the credited actor actually create the demand? |
| Legitimacy | ARR inflation, launch ranking, waitlist theatre, compliance claims, press laundering | Is the status signal independently verifiable and properly defined? |
